fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date that uniquely identifies an inventory period.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the inventory period entry was created.

fields.name: Creation Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the inventory period entry was created.

fields.name: Closing Item Register No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the last item register in a closed inventory period.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type for an inventory period entry, such as closed or re-opened.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies any useful information about the inventory period entry.
